productDisplayName: Puma Men Black Aquil II Sports Shoes
description: Style Notepuma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalist design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these Puma Aquil II shoes are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. This pair is great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style.Product Details Mesh upper with synthetic and suede overlaysSynthetic twill tape laces in dual tones Outsole reinforced on to the toe to act as a toe guardFormstripe on the sideComfort insole with tongue to ensure a snug, comfortable FitTextile lining for added comfortLightweight midsole Made of high traction rubber and has a scooped midfootMultidirectional lugs,nubs and flex grooves on the outsoleMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust, grime or dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
